svg.text: mKernel GEMM_AR fused dataflow: CTA roles + receive/reduce/publish order
The key ordering is linear: Data WR -> recv_buf, Ready WR -> arrival_queue, recv-progress -> remote flag, local+remote AND -> reduce/publish, published_chunks -> iter-end.
G local GPUs per node; NN nodes; GPU d owns final rows [d*M/G, (d+1)*M/G)
A [M,Ks] bf16, B [Ks,N] bf16, partial C [M,N], final C_final [M,N]
tile = 128 x 256 bf16 = 64 KiB; chunk = chunk_tiles tiles, default chunk_tiles = 4, chunk <= 256 KiB
slice shape per GPU d = [M/G, N]; tile shape = [128,256]
recv_buf shape per GPU = [(NN-1) peer slots, slice_tiles]
Step 8 is not parallel with Step 7.
It waits for all published chunks.
multicast scope: node-local CUDA/NVLink multicast, not cross-node broadcast

Source anchors: src/gemm_ar.cu fused_kernel, fused_intra_ar_sm, fused_inter_send_sm, fused_inter_recv_progress_sm, shared_reduce_my_slice_static; include/comm/internode/proxy_efa.h Data/Ready WR chain.
